messages.content: 我们将于六月八日上午九点半-10点半将举行Centric Brands Compliance System Training，培训是以英语进行的，你能不能帮我发封邮件告诉供应商们，并让他们告诉我们是否能出席会议。英语邮件哦

Subject: Invitation to Centric Brands Compliance System Training on June 8, 9:30 - 10:30 am

Dear valued suppliers,

We hope this message finds you well. We are pleased to announce that we will be hosting the Centric Brands Compliance System Training on June 8, from 9:30 to 10:30 am. The training will be conducted in English and we highly encourage you to attend.

During the training, our compliance team will provide an overview of our compliance policies and procedures, as well as an introduction to the Centric Brands Compliance System. This system is designed to ensure that all suppliers are compliant with our ethical and social responsibility expectations.

Please let us know if you or any of your team members would like to attend the training by June 5. You can email us back with the names and email addresses of the attendees.

We sincerely hope that you can join us for this important training session. As always, thank you for your continued support and partnership.

Best regards,

[Your name]
这是供应商都必须参加的，不用建议这些，重写写一下

Subject: Mandatory Attendance for Centric Brands Compliance System Training on June 8, 9:30 - 10:30 am

Dear valued suppliers,

We would like to remind you that attendance for the Centric Brands Compliance System Training on June 8, from 9:30 to 10:30 am, is mandatory for all suppliers who do business with us. The training will be conducted in English and it is important that all suppliers fully understand our compliance policies and procedures.

During the training, our compliance team will provide an overview of our compliance policies and procedures, as well as an introduction to the Centric Brands Compliance System. This system is designed to ensure that all suppliers are compliant with our ethical and social responsibility expectations.

Please ensure that you or a member of your team attend the training session. If there are any scheduling conflicts or issues that may prevent attendance, please inform us as soon as possible. We look forward to your participation in this important training session.

Thank you for your cooperation and continued support.

Best regards,

[Your name]
我们将于六月八日上午九点半-10点半举行一场培训，主要是给centric brands的供应商们介绍合规系统，培训是以英语进行的，你能不能帮我发封英语邮件告诉供应商们，并让他们确认回复出席情况

Subject: Invitation to Centric Brands Compliance System Training on June 8, 9:30 - 10:30 am

Dear valued suppliers,

We are pleased to invite you to the Centric Brands Compliance System Training on June 8, from 9:30 to 10:30 am. The training will be conducted in English and is designed for all suppliers who do business with us.

During the training, our compliance team will provide an overview of our compliance policies and procedures, as well as an introduction to the Centric Brands Compliance System. This system is designed to ensure that all suppliers are compliant with our ethical and social responsibility expectations.

We kindly request that you RSVP by June 5 to confirm your attendance. Please reply to this email with the names and email addresses of the attendees and provide us with any dietary restrictions or special requirements.

This training session is an important opportunity for us to ensure that our suppliers fully understand our compliance policies and procedures. We look forward to your participation and thank you for your continued support.

Best regards,

[Your name]

Subject: Invitation to Centric Brands Compliance System Training on June 8, 9:30 - 10:30 am via Teams

Dear valued suppliers,

We would like to invite you to the Centric Brands Compliance System Training on June 8, from 9:30 to 10:30 am, via Teams. The training will be conducted in English and it is relevant to all suppliers who do business with us.

During the training, our compliance team will provide an overview of our compliance policies and procedures, as well as an introduction to the Centric Brands Compliance System. This system is designed to ensure that all suppliers are compliant with our ethical and social responsibility expectations.

To confirm your attendance, please reply to this email by June 5 with the names and email addresses of the attendees. We will send further instructions and a Teams link closer to the training date.

This training session is an opportunity for us to ensure that our suppliers fully understand our compliance policies and procedures. We appreciate your continued support and look forward to your participation in this important training.

Best regards,

[Your name]
正如你们知道，你们是Centric Brands Packaging Optimization 计划选定的供应商之一，为了推动这一项目，我们将于六月八日上午九点半-10点半在teams举行一场培训，主要是给centric brands的供应商们介绍合规系统，培训是以英语进行的，你能不能帮我发封英语邮件告诉供应商们，并让他们确认回复出席情况

Subject: Invitation to Centric Brands Packaging Optimization Program Training on June 8, 9:30 - 10:30 am via Teams

Dear valued suppliers,

We are pleased to inform you that your company has been selected as one of the suppliers for the Centric Brands Packaging Optimization Program. To support the program, we would like to invite you to a training session on June 8, from 9:30 to 10:30 am, via Teams. The training will be conducted in English and it is relevant to all suppliers who do business with us.

During the training, our compliance team will provide an overview of our compliance policies and procedures, as well as an introduction to the Centric Brands Compliance System. This system is designed to ensure that all suppliers are compliant with our ethical and social responsibility expectations.

To confirm your attendance, please reply to this email by June 5 with the names and email addresses of the attendees. We will send further instructions and a Teams link closer to the training date.

This training session is an opportunity for us to work together to optimize our packaging processes and reduce our collective environmental impact. We appreciate your continued support and look forward to your participation in this important training.

Best regards,

[Your name]
正如你们知道，你们是Centric Brands Packaging Optimization 计划选定的供应商之一，为了推动这一项目，我们将于六月八日上午九点半-10点半在teams举行一场培训，主要是给centric brands的供应商们介绍合规系统，培训是以英语进行的，附件是培训链接，请及时点开，你能不能帮我发封英语邮件告诉供应商们，并让他们确认回复出席情况

Subject: Invitation and Training Link to Centric Brands Packaging Optimization Program Training on June 8, 9:30 - 10:30 am via Teams

Dear valued suppliers,

We are pleased to inform you that your company has been selected as one of the suppliers for the Centric Brands Packaging Optimization Program. To support the program, we would like to invite you to a training session on June 8, from 9:30 to 10:30 am, via Teams. The training will be conducted in English and it is relevant to all suppliers who do business with us.

Please find the training link attached to this email and click on it to access the training meeting. The link will require a Teams account to join, so please make sure to prepare an account before the training day.

During the training, our compliance team will provide an overview of our compliance policies and procedures, as well as an introduction to the Centric Brands Compliance System. This system is designed to ensure that all suppliers are compliant with our ethical and social responsibility expectations.

To confirm your attendance, please reply to this email by June 5 with the names and email addresses of the attendees.

This training session is an opportunity for us to work together to optimize our packaging processes and reduce our collective environmental impact. We appreciate your continued support and look forward to your participation in this important training.

Best regards,

[Your name]

Dear Valued Supplier
As you know, your company has been selected as one of the suppliers for the Centric Brands Packaging Optimization Program. To support the program, we would like to invite you to a training session on June 8, from 9:30 to 10:30 am, via Teams. The purpose of this training is to introduce the Centric Brands Compliance System.
Please find the training link attached to this email and click on it to access the training meeting on time.  To confirm your attendance, please also respond to this email by June 7. Thank you
有错误吗？帮我优化一下

Dear valued supplier,

We are pleased to inform you that your company has been selected as one of the suppliers for the Centric Brands Packaging Optimization Program. To support the program, we would like to invite you to a training session on June 8, from 9:30 to 10:30 am, via Teams. The purpose of this training is to introduce the Centric Brands Compliance System.

Please find the training link attached to this email and click on it to access the training meeting on time. If you encounter any technical issues or require assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.

To confirm your attendance, please respond to this email by June 7 with the names and email addresses of the attendees. This will help us ensure that everyone who needs to participate is included in the training session.

Thank you for your continued support and partnership. We look forward to your participation in this important training.

Best regards,

[Your name]

Dear valued supplier,

We are pleased to inform you that your company has been selected as one of the suppliers for the Centric Brands Packaging Optimization Program. To support the program, we would like to invite you to a training session on June 8, from 9:30 to 10:30 am, via Teams. The training will be conducted in English and it is designed to introduce the Centric Brands Compliance System to all suppliers who do business with us.

Please find the training link attached to this email and click on it to access the training meeting on time. If you encounter any technical issues or require assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.

To confirm your attendance, please reply to this email by June 7 with the names and email addresses of the attendees. This will help us ensure that everyone who needs to participate is included in the training session.

Thank you for your continued support and partnership. We look forward to your participation in this important training.

Best regards,

[Your name]
Compliance System Training Invitation这句话对吗？

Yes, "Compliance System Training Invitation" is a correct phrase to use in an invitation for compliance system training. It clearly and concisely communicates the purpose of the training and invites the recipient to attend.
